eng.definition: (Typically of an action or activity) wicked or criminal.
examples: The villain's nefarious plans were foiled by the hero.
He was known for his nefarious deeds.
The nefarious activities of the gang were exposed by the police.

hin.definition: a feeling of worry or unease
examples: उसको अपनी तबीयत की चिंता हो रही थी।
मुझे मेरे परीक्षा की चिंता है।
तुम्हें अपने खोए हुए सामान की चिंता नहीं होनी चाहिए।
